Cui Yong еҙ”еӢҮ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Yong (еҙ”еӢҮ). Served Guo Si. Killed by Xu Huang after taunting Yang Feng. Cui Yong is a fictional character. Cui Yong was affiliated with Guo Si.
